scripts.check: bun run check:core && bun run check:mcp && bun run check:openapi && bun run check:react && bun run typecheck:example
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:core && bun run typecheck:mcp && bun run typecheck:openapi && bun run typecheck:react && bun run typecheck:example
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/mcp test && bun run --cwd packages/openapi test && bun run --cwd packages/react test
